# Maintainers

This file lists the current maintainers of `srt-slurm-recipes`. Maintainers are
responsible for reviewing contributions, triaging issues, and upholding the
[Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [Governance](GOVERNANCE.md) policies.

## Current Maintainers

| Name          | GitHub       | Role            |
| ------------- | ------------ | --------------- |
| Seong Hee Lee | @shljessie   | Lead maintainer |
| Faradawn Yang     | @faradawn    | Maintainer      |
| Sachin Beldona        | @AlphaBladez | Maintainer      |
| Chris Hoge    | @choge       | Maintainer      |
| Max Xu         | @zhenghax    | Maintainer      |

<!-- Add additional maintainers with name, GitHub handle, and role. -->

## Escalation

For conduct concerns, contact GitHub_Conduct@nvidia.com. For security issues,
follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). For anything else, open an issue or reach out
to a maintainer listed above.
